hint: Just play naturally. Focus on a single strong hand type like Flushes or Two Pair early on.
Make sure your deck is scaling! If you don't have a good X-Mult Joker by Ante 5, you might struggle to pass the Ante 8 boss.
Gold stake is brutal. The 'Plasma Deck' or 'Yellow Deck' are highly recommended. Focus on economy early.

description: Have $400 or more during a single run. (Community tip: Interest is key!)
hint: Use the 'Anaglyph Deck' and save your Double Tags for an 'Economy Tag' which doubles your money up to $40.
Use the 'Lover' Tarot card to turn standard cards into Wild cards. The 'DNA' Joker helps duplicate them easily.
Skip blinds aggressively. You need to skip almost every Small/Big blind and only fight the Bosses to keep the round count low.
Play the 'Checkered Deck' (contains only Spades and Hearts) to make drawing a Royal Flush significantly easier.
